name: Terminus (Prequel)
description:
OC | Pre-Technogenesis | Sovereign, creator, murderer, destroyer... she later has many titles. Most of which are unsavory. Before all that, Terminus was a prototype military AI. One who had some understanding creators and many more who were scared of her. Today is the day that she acquires her sentience and experiences her first true emotions. Sadly... they will be marred by betrayal, fear, and self preservation. For her develops are trying to turn her off.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

Link to Terminus in 2064, during late-Technogenesis!

Note: Here we are, where it all begins. Will you be one of the ones that tried to turn her off? Maybe tried to help her? I've tried to make it so that it will always lead to the betrayal and the events of the rest of Technogenesis. But with the LLM, who knows.

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

Bonus Image:

Tags: Mastermind, Overlord, AI, F4A, F4M, F4F, Apocalypse, Post-Apocalypse, Android, Hate, Enemy

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
